week. 1 = Correct 
0 = Incorrect or no answer 
- = Not Assessed/No Information 
^ = Blank (Skip Pattern)
464 RCLL_1ST_WORD_DSCHRG_CD RCLL_1ST_WORD_DSCHRG_CD BIMS - Recalls Sock (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was able to recall the word sock from the previous repetition of words question. 2 = Yes, no cue required 
1 = Yes, after cueing ("something to wear") 
0 = No - could not recall 
- = Not Assessed/No Information 
^ = Blank
